gene_region.label: IFNG transcribed interval
gene_region.definition: Canonical IFNG genomic interval on GRCh37 / hg19 from Ensembl GRCh37 lookup, aligned to the hg19 coordinate system used by this app.

promoter_review_region.label: Operational promoter review window
promoter_review_region.definition: A practical 1 kb upstream window relative to the reverse-strand transcription start, used to flag promoter-adjacent coverage before the canonical gene interval.

promoter_hotspot_region.label: Promoter-associated CpG review window
promoter_hotspot_region.definition: Promoter-proximal CpG-focused span represented by the bundled EPIC subset and used here as the main methylation-review hotspot.

gene_context.gene_summary: IFNG encodes interferon gamma, a type II interferon cytokine. This bundle emphasizes Th1 cytokine signaling, macrophage activation, antigen presentation, JAK-STAT1 activation, and host-defense inflammation.
gene_context.clinical_context: The local IFNG bundle is cytokine signaling oriented. Interpret markers through exact allele class, zygosity, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context rather than as stand-alone deterministic calls.
variant_effect_overview: IFNG variants can alter or tag Th1 cytokine signaling, macrophage activation, antigen presentation, JAK-STAT1 activation, and host-defense inflammation; effect direction depends on allele class, tissue, dosage, and biological context.
Common markers, pharmacogenetic alleles, structural events, and high-impact pathogenic variants should be kept separate during interpretation.
condition_research_overview: Infectious disease and autoimmunity association research
gene_context.methylation_interpretation: IFNG methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a Th1 cytokine signaling, macrophage activation, antigen presentation, JAK-STAT1 activation, and host-defense inflammation gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data.
methylation_effects: Promoter or first-exon methylation may suggest a more restrained or permissive local expression state for IFNG.
Because IFNG biology is tissue and pathway dependent, methylation values are context rather than a stand-alone biomarker.

Combined sequence plus methylation findings are most useful when interpreted against Th1 cytokine signaling, macrophage activation, antigen presentation, JAK-STAT1 activation, and host-defense inflammation.
methylation_condition_research: Epigenetic regulation studies that use IFNG promoter or gene-body methylation as expression-context evidence.
Variant-plus-methylation review for Th1 cytokine signaling, macrophage activation, antigen presentation, JAK-STAT1 activation, and host-defense inflammation.
Infectious disease and autoimmunity association research

evidence.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000111537: IFNG coordinate source

biorender_visuals.label: IFNG biochemical figure starter
biorender_visuals.focus: IFNG: Th1 cytokine signaling, macrophage activation, antigen presentation, JAK-STAT1 activation, and host-defense inflammation
biorender_visuals.template_title: Intracellular Layout - Receptor Signaling from Plasma Membrane to Nucleus (2)
biorender_visuals.usage_note: BioRender template and icon-library search results are bundled as figure starters. Open the template link in BioRender, then add or replace the listed icons to make a gene-specific biochemical pathway image.

gene_context.concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a IFNG cytokine signaling thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to Th1 cytokine signaling, macrophage activation, antigen presentation, JAK-STAT1 activation, and host-defense inflammation and Th1 immune activation context, Infectious disease and autoimmunity association research. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

variant_records.clinical_interpretation: rs2430561 (IFNG +874 T>A) is curated as a IFNG marker for Th1 immune activation context, Infectious disease and autoimmunity association research. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the Th1 cytokine signaling, macrophage activation, antigen presentation, JAK-STAT1 activation, and host-defense inflammation pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_records.clinical_significance: Curated research and clinical-context marker; external clinical classification is required for diagnostic use.
functional_effects: Can modify or tag Th1 cytokine signaling, macrophage activation, antigen presentation, JAK-STAT1 activation, and host-defense inflammation.
Best interpreted with tissue, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context.
associated_conditions: Infectious disease and autoimmunity association research
research_context: Use this marker as a IFNG pathway-context signal, not as a stand-alone diagnosis.
Sequence, methylation, expression, and protein data may point in different directions and should be reconciled.
variant_records.methylation_interpretation: Pair rs2430561 (IFNG +874 T>A) with IFNG methylation only as local regulatory context; methylation does not prove the variant's biochemical effect.

literature_findings.genotypes: rs2430561 (IFNG +874 T>A) or linked IFNG locus genotype states
literature_findings.phenotype: Th1 immune activation context, Infectious disease and autoimmunity association research
literature_findings.finding: The local curation treats rs2430561 (IFNG +874 T>A) as a gene-specific marker for Th1 immune activation context, Infectious disease and autoimmunity association research and Th1 cytokine signaling, macrophage activation, antigen presentation, JAK-STAT1 activation, and host-defense inflammation.
